Issues: The image is a stylized digital illustration of a cityscape. While the image itself does not contain explicit violations, its commercial suitability depends heavily on the specific licensing and usage rights granted by the creator. If this is intended for commercial sale, the creator must ensure they own the full copyright and commercial rights to the underlying artwork.

The style is highly popular (futuristic/neon aesthetic). While this increases general appeal, it might lack extreme uniqueness if used in a mass-market context without significant artistic refinement or unique conceptual framing.
